_comment: Repro record: V5 double training episodes for convergence
command_train: conda run --cwd /home/sun/phdproject/dqn/DQN6 -n ros2py310 python train.py --profile forest_a_all6_600_cuda_v5
command_infer: conda run --cwd /home/sun/phdproject/dqn/DQN6 -n ros2py310 python infer.py --profile forest_a_all6_600_cuda_v5

changes.configs/forest_a_all6_600_cuda_v5.json: New V5 profile: episodes 300->600, eps_decay 250->500. Proportional scaling to allow convergence.

rationale: V4 (300ep) reward curve declined throughout training. Analysis showed agent failure rate was 42-56% in last 50 pure-exploitation episodes (ep 251-300), indicating insufficient training time. Expert removed at ep ~255, leaving only 45 episodes for pure policy learning. V5 doubles to 600ep with proportional eps_decay=500, giving 91 pure-exploitation episodes and 2x total learning experience.
